candidate_objects.name: Command Menu Trigger
candidate_objects.reasoning: No existing registry entry matched the trigger component and Stage1 classified it as a labeled interactive control.
candidate_objects.verdict_reasoning: No matching external component in the OODS registry snapshot.

candidate_objects.name: Issue Row
candidate_objects.reasoning: Existing row mapping is close but missing sorting capability.
candidate_objects.verdict_reasoning: Existing map lacks Sortable and needs notes updated for the current evidence set.

changed_fields.to: Patched from Stage1 reconciliation report v1.1.0

alternate_interpretations.reasoning: Alternate DOM cluster could also be treated as a tabular row.

candidate_objects.name: Billing Plan Card
candidate_objects.reasoning: Observed plan card still matches the canonical registry mapping.
candidate_objects.verdict_reasoning: Existing mapping already matches name, system, and trait set.

candidate_objects.name: Workspace Switcher
candidate_objects.reasoning: Observed behavior conflicts with the current registry mapping.
candidate_objects.verdict_reasoning: Existing mapping classifies this control as Stateful rather than Navigable, and the trait sets are incompatible without review.

alternate_interpretations.reasoning: Dropdown mechanics overlap with select-like controls.
The trigger can also be interpreted as an action launcher.

candidate_objects.name: Experimental Badge
candidate_objects.reasoning: Stage1 found a new badge-like status marker, but confidence is below the default OODS apply threshold.
candidate_objects.verdict_reasoning: Candidate remains actionable but should queue for review at the default minConfidence.

candidate_actions.name: Issue Form Submit
candidate_actions.reasoning: DOM listeners indicate a form submit action tied to issue creation.

alternate_verbs.reasoning: The same button may be interpreted as a save action.

preconditions.description: Visible to members with issue-create permissions.

conflicts.description: Workspace Switcher maps to a different canonical trait set in the current registry.
Experimental Badge scored 0.61 and will queue at the default 0.75 threshold.

coverage_gaps.description: Keyboard shortcut affordances were not visible in the captured DOM.
